The following events took place in '''177 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*A [[Almas Academy|Jedi school]] is founded on [[Almas]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that the Almas Academy was founded 145 years before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore be deduced that the academy was founded in 177 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{Imo}}
